nodes.prompt: Implement the requested change. Write clean, working code with appropriate tests.
Review the code for logical errors, edge cases, and potential runtime failures. List any bugs found, or confirm the code looks correct.
Review the code for security vulnerabilities: injection risks, unsafe input handling, credential exposure, or insecure defaults. List any issues found, or confirm the code looks safe.
Synthesize the bug review and security review findings into a concise verdict. Summarize the most important issues and recommend whether the code is ready to merge or needs fixes.
